feature.insert_shape: upsert {project_id, user_id, date(todayHKT), weather(晴|陰|雨|暴雨|熱|凍|大風), progress_item_ids uuid[], freeform_items text[], notes} onConflict=project_id,user_id,date
feature.write_rule: main_contractor + sub_role in (foreman, engineer), self only, approved member
feature.read_rule: any approved project member reads all dailies in project
feature.lock_rule: UPDATE/DELETE only when row.date == today HKT; INSERT has NO date check

steps.step: foreman 60001004 upsert today's daily 大風 [sim-0610] 外牆架已搭好

steps.result: PASS (denied 42501, matches client promise 判頭唔可以寫日誌)
PASS (read-only allowed per RLS + client copy)
FAIL — DB accepted it; lock rule only covers UPDATE/DELETE

bugs.title: dailies insert RLS has no date=today check — foreman/engineer can fabricate backdated (or future) daily logs via API
bugs.repro: Sign in as 60001004 (main_contractor/foreman); POST /rest/v1/dailies?on_conflict=project_id,user_id,date with Prefer: resolution=merge-duplicates and body {"project_id":"cccc2026-2026-2026-2026-000026202620","user_id":"aaaa1004-...","date":"2026-06-09","weather":"晴","freeform_items":["[sim-0610] 補寫尋日日誌測試"],"notes":"[sim-0610] backdated insert test"}
bugs.evidence: 201-equivalent success: [{"id":"8e49641d-31c2-40e3-b566-c88b494d9455","date":"2026-06-09",...,"created_at":"2026-06-10T15:54:21Z"}]. v11-dailies-schema.sql header states 'yesterday's diary stays locked' but dailies_insert policy (lines 64-80) checks role+membership only, no date = (now() at time zone 'Asia/Hong_Kong')::date clause. Secondary effect: the backdated row is then PERMANENT — update/delete policies block the author from correcting or removing it (PATCH/DELETE both returned []).

residual_rows: dailies 8e49641d-31c2-40e3-b566-c88b494d9455 (2026-06-09, foreman, [sim-0610], undeletable by author due to delete lock — needs admin/SQL cleanup)
